description: CompositionGrey round neck T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves and brand logo below the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careWash in cold waterDry in shadeIron on reverse of designRevel in the mind-calming comfort of self-importance and flaunt that mood in style with this chimp T-shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this T-shirt with denims and canvas shoes for a great casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
